nasb.text: Then Miriam and Aaron spoke against Moses because of the Cushite woman whom he had married (for he had married a Cushite woman);

esv.text: Miriam and Aaron spoke against Moses because of the Cushite woman whom he had married, for he had married a Cushite woman.

cnv.text: 米利暗和亞倫，為了摩西所娶的古實女子的緣故，就出言反對摩西，因為他娶了一個古實女子為妻。

ccb.text: 米利暗和亚伦因摩西娶了一个古实的女子而批评他，说：
